data.title: Add structural marker tests for Phase 0 comfort assessment in test-onboarding-skill.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Implementation
Modify tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh to add structural marker assertions for the new Phase 0 pre-flight section and confidence context object that will be introduced in the SKILL.md.

File to modify: tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh

Add the following test functions (awk/grep pattern checks — per Behavioral Testing Standard Rule 5 for instruction files):
- test_phase0_comfort_question_present: SKILL.md contains a Phase 0 or Pre-flight section header with a comfort question marker (e.g., grep for 'Phase 0' or 'comfort' or 'comfort.*question')
- test_confidence_context_schema_present: SKILL.md contains a confidence_context section or object in scratchpad init (e.g., grep for 'confidence_context' or 'CONFIDENCE_CONTEXT')
- test_seven_dimensions_present: SKILL.md references all 7 confidence dimensions (stack, commands, architecture, infrastructure, CI, design, enforcement) in the context of confidence assignment
- test_confidence_levels_documented: SKILL.md documents high/medium/low as valid confidence level values
- test_contract_ref_present: SKILL.md or adjacent contract file at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ references the confidence-context schema

These tests must FAIL (RED) before the SKILL.md is modified — the current SKILL.md has no Phase 0 or confidence_context references.

Test approach (Given/When/Then):
- Given: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md exists at its current state (no Phase 0)
- When: the test functions grep/awk for Phase 0 and confidence_context markers
- Then: tests return non-zero (RED) confirming the markers are absent

Update .test-index with RED marker for SKILL.md → this test file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests pass (exit 0) when SKILL.md has Phase 0 section and confidence_context markers
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] tests fail (RED) before SKILL.md changes (this is the RED gate)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_phase0_comfort_question_present] for plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_phase0_comfort_question_present\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] No content assertions — only structural boundary checks (section headers, key term presence)
  Verify: grep -v 'grep\|awk' tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh | grep -v 'assert' | wc -l
